caption: A man wearing glasses, a white collared shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen text and logos appear in the lower corners, including "PODCAST" and "SS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains seated in the same position, subtly shifting his head and facial expression. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then slightly tilts his head and looks downward with a more somber or thoughtful countenance. His posture remains relatively still as the camera captures these slight movements against the detailed studio backdrop.
